name: EZPAWN
description_short: EZPAWN San Antonio, Texas — EZPAWN in Las Vegas offers collateral-based pawn loans, gold and diamond buying, firearms loans, and discounted pre-owned br...
description_long:
EZPAWN is a branded pawn shop chain with a location at 1501 E. Charleston Blvd. in Las Vegas, NV. The store operates six days with extended weekday hours (9am–7pm Mon–Sat) and reduced Sunday hours (12–5pm), positioning itself as a neighborhood financial and retail resource. It is a member of the broader EZPAWN family of stores, which operates across multiple states with a standardized service menu and loyalty program infrastructure.

The store offers a wide range of services centered on collateral-based lending and secondhand retail. Customers can bring electronics, jewelry, gold, firearms, tools, gaming equipment, musical gear, handbags, and sneakers for pawn loans or outright sale. The gold-buying desk accepts items of any karat or weight. Firearms loans and purchases are available on-site with secure storage and background check requirements on redemption. On the retail side, the store sells pre-owned brand-name merchandise at 25–70% off standard retail prices, with new inventory arriving daily. Auto loans are also listed as an available service at this location.

Several features distinguish this EZPAWN location beyond basic pawn transactions. The EZ+ Rewards program allows customers to earn points on pawn, redemption, sell, and purchase transactions and manage accounts, make payments on pawn extensions, and handle layaways online. An Instant Quote tool on the website lets customers get an estimated value for electronics before visiting the store. Layaway is available year-round with 10% down and monthly payments, and a "Take Today" option through third-party partners offers financing for up to 12 months or more, subject to credit eligibility. Product protection plans and a Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and free cleaning round out the ancillary offerings.

EZPAWN is a legitimate option for Las Vegas residents who need fast cash against personal property and don't qualify for or want traditional credit products. That said, pawn loan fees, interest rates, and APR are not disclosed on the website—customers must inquire in-store, which makes cost comparisons impossible before visiting. The "Take Today" financing option is credit-dependent, so not all buyers will qualify. Pawn loans are explicitly described as subject to fees and terms without specifics provided online, which is a meaningful transparency gap for a consumer finance product.
address: 2612 S Presa St, San Antonio, TX 78210

company_info.headquarters: 2612 S Presa St, San Antonio, TX 78210

pros: EZ+ Rewards program lets customers manage pawns, layaways, and payments online from any device
Instant Quote tool provides estimated electronics value before visiting the store
Firearms loans and purchases available on-site with secure storage facility
Layaway requires only 10% down with monthly payment schedule
Pre-owned merchandise priced 25–70% below standard retail with daily new arrivals
Gold and diamond buying accepts any karat or weight with professional testing
Auto loans available at this location in addition to standard pawn services
cons: Pawn loan interest rates and fees are not published online—terms only available in-store
"Take Today" financing is subject to credit eligibility, not guaranteed for all customers
Sunday hours are limited to 12–5pm, significantly shorter than weekday availability
Online payment functionality is unavailable in Arizona, Oregon, and Pennsylvania (chain-level limitation)
No disclosed minimum or maximum loan amounts, making it hard to plan before visiting
best_for: Las Vegas residents needing same-day cash against electronics, jewelry, gold, or firearms
Bargain shoppers seeking brand-name pre-owned goods at steep discounts
Firearms owners who want collateral-based loans with secure on-site storage
Consumers who want layaway or installment options on secondhand merchandise without a credit check
diagnosis: EZPAWN is best suited for Las Vegas consumers who need immediate cash against personal property—especially electronics, jewelry, gold, or firearms—and for bargain shoppers seeking discounted pre-owned goods with flexible payment options. The primary caveat is a lack of fee and rate transparency online: pawn loan costs are only disclosed in-store, making it impossible to compare the true cost of borrowing before walking in.
services: Online shop with daily new arrivals
Take Today third-party financing (up to 12+ months)
EZ+ Rewards program (points on pawn, sell, purchase, redeem)
Product Protection Plan for electronics and audio/video
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan amounts, free cleaning, trade-up)
